column3: A place used for housing, display, or reference; supports hierarchical nesting and geometric definition.

This model defines locations as CIDOC CRM places that can be nested (e.g., wall → room → building → institution → city → country) and identified with external authority IDs. Locations may be described by textual notes and documents and can be defined geometrically (points, lines, polygons, bounding boxes) via space primitives.
Documents or records describing or defining the location (e.g., floor plans, catalogues).
Geometric definition of the place (e.g., WKT/GeoJSON point, polygon, bbox).
An identifier from an external authority (e.g., TGN, GeoNames, Wikidata).
Type of external identifier (e.g., “TGN ID”, “GeoNames ID”, “Wikidata QID”).
Geometry form (e.g., point, polyline, polygon, bbox); match the literal format (WKT/GeoJSON).

column1: // Optional: map to an institution (if modelling an institutional place explicitly)
